metadata.greeting: This weekend is packed with exciting activities for your little one! Get ready for a fun-filled Easter Weekender at Camden Market with arts, crafts, and face painting. Also, don't miss the chance to explore Victoria Park with a variety of free daily activities designed for kids.

activities.title: Camden Market Easter Weekender
activities.description: Easter art trail, face painting, and bonnet making. Soak up the atmosphere and street performances.
activities.whyItWorks: Hands-on activities, visual stimulation, and free entry make it ideal for a 3-year-old.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Camden Road or Tube to Camden Town
transport.tip: Can get crowded, especially on Sunday. Arrive early.

activities.title: Two weeks of Easter activities
activities.description: A full fortnight of free, daily activities that stretch from sports and fishing (!) to pond dipping.
activities.whyItWorks: Variety of activities to keep a 3-year-old engaged, mostly outdoors.

transport.tip: Check the Victoria Park Facebook page for a schedule and details.

activities.title: REPLAY: A Limitless Recycled Playground
activities.description: Explore a world of play and invention in a recycled playground for children and their grown-ups
activities.whyItWorks: Recycled materials and creative play environment, good for tactile learning.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Liverpool Street, then tube to Waterloo

activities.title: Young V&A
activities.address: Cambridge Heath Rd, Bethnal Green, E2 9PA
activities.description: Interactive galleries with toys, design and playful exhibits
activities.whyItWorks: Specifically designed for children, lots of hands-on activities.

transport.fromHackney: Bus or Overground to Bethnal Green
transport.tip: Avoid peak hours for a more relaxed visit

activities.title: Vauxhall City Farm
activities.description: Free Easter hunts and bonnet-making crafts, goats, sheep and smaller animals right on your doorstep.
activities.whyItWorks: Animals, crafts, and outdoor activities make this a good choice for a 3-year-old.

activities.title: Revel Puck Circus: A Glimmer Daze Gambit
activities.description: A tented touring show by Revel Puck Circus, offering acrobatics, clowning and general chaos.
activities.whyItWorks: Visually stimulating, energetic, and engaging for young children.

transport.tip: Check website for showtimes and ticket prices.

activities.title: Discover Greenwich Park Playground
activities.description: A large, traditional wooden playground with a great water area in the summer. The Cove, a maritime-themed playground, is also in Greenwich Park.
activities.whyItWorks: Outdoor play, water area, and variety of play structures for different ages.

transport.tip: Pack a change of clothes for the water area.

activities.title: Sky Garden
activities.description: Enjoy panoramic views of London from this indoor garden. Booking required.
activities.whyItWorks: Amazing views, indoor garden, and free entry.

transport.tip: Book in advance as it gets busy.

activities.title: Easter Eggsplorers
activities.description: Giant Easter egg trail, meet the Easter Bunny, indoor playbarn, Easter entertainment, outdoor adventure play villages, zoo and farm animals.
activities.whyItWorks: Variety of activities, including animals and play areas. Good for a full day out.

activities.title: Hampton Court Palace Lindt Gold Bunny Hunt
activities.description: Roam around the gardens and find hidden Lindt Gold Bunny statues to win a chocolate treat.
activities.whyItWorks: Outdoor exploration, chocolate reward, and beautiful palace grounds.

activities.title: Natural History Museum Easter Family Festival
activities.description: Free family-friendly activities, dinosaur exhibits, and interactive learning.
activities.whyItWorks: Dinosaur-themed, educational, and lots to see and do.

transport.tip: Book tickets for special exhibits in advance.

activities.title: Science Museum
activities.address: Exhibition Road, South Kensington, London SW7 2DD
activities.description: Explore interactive exhibits, space exploration gallery, and hands-on activities.
activities.whyItWorks: Interactive, educational, and appeals to children's curiosity.

activities.title: Battersea Park
activities.description: Scenic escape with lush gardens, a boating lake, playgrounds, and a mini zoo.
activities.whyItWorks: Outdoor space, gardens, playground and mini zoo make it a good all-rounder

activities.title: Horniman Museum and Gardens
activities.address: 100 London Road, Forest Hill, London SE23 3PQ
activities.description: Explore natural history, musical instruments, and gardens. The Animal Walk features alpacas, sheep, goats, chickens and more.
activities.whyItWorks: Variety of exhibits, gardens, and animal encounters.

activities.title: Golders Hill Park Zoo
activities.description: Small zoo home to rare species of birds and animals, including wallabies and lemurs.
activities.whyItWorks: Free, animals, and a manageable size for toddlers.

transport.fromHackney: Tube and bus to Golders Green
transport.tip: Combine with a visit to Hampstead Heath.

activities.title: British Library
activities.description: Major new free show Fairy Tales opens just in time for Easter. It's an immersive journey through the world of fairy tale.
activities.whyItWorks: Fairytales, educational, good for escaping the weather

transport.tip: Check website for timings and booking requirements

activities.title: Paddington The Musical
activities.description: The story of Paddington Bear arriving at Paddington Station told through music and choreography.
activities.whyItWorks: Family-friendly, musical, and based on a beloved character.

transport.fromHackney: Tube to Covent Garden or Charing Cross

activities.title: The Lion King
activities.description: Celebrated for its stirring puppetry and live music.
activities.whyItWorks: Puppetry, Music, Visual spectacle

activities.title: We're Going on a Bear Hunt
activities.description: A musical stage version of Michael Rosen's beloved book.
activities.whyItWorks: Audience participation and live music.

activities.title: Tales from Acorn Wood
activities.description: Treat the kids to a top show packed full of toe-tapping songs, puppetry and all the friends from Acorn Wood.
activities.whyItWorks: Puppetry, songs, good for little ones

activities.title: Family Easter activities at Garden Museum
activities.description: Workshops including tea caddy making and gelli plate painting. Kids cookery classes (costs £5 per child).
activities.whyItWorks: Hands-on activities, garden-themed, and encourages creativity.

transport.fromHackney: Tube to Lambeth North or Waterloo

activities.title: British Library Story Explorers
activities.description: The British Library 'Story Explorers' programme is great for children and also free.
activities.whyItWorks: Stories, educational, and free

transport.tip: Check website for dates and times.

activities.title: Southbank Centre Spring Family Fun
activities.description: Multi-artform programme presenting music, storytelling, dance, crafts, comedy and more with dozens of events on the programme – many of them free to attend!
activities.whyItWorks: Varied, good for introducing little ones to the arts

activities.title: Harry Potter and the Cursed Child
activities.description: Spectacular show, but very long (two parts).
activities.whyItWorks: Visually amazing, great for older children

transport.tip: Not suitable for young children - long running time
